state_tasks.oa_gather_camera_occupancy: Collect bounded camera occupancy context packet from door camera (privacy-safe structured context only).
state_tasks.oa_gather_entry_events: Collect entry-event context packet from door camera for timestamped event summary.
state_tasks.oa_gather_exit_events: Collect exit-event context packet from door camera for timestamped event summary.
state_tasks.oa_gather_anonymous_tracks: Collect anonymous track context from room camera (no identity inference).
state_tasks.oa_gather_motion_events: Collect motion event context from room camera.
state_tasks.oa_gather_camera_coverage: Collect camera coverage metadata for smart_room_1 (coverage-gap reasoning).
state_tasks.oa_synthesize: Synthesize a privacy-bounded occupancy answer (bounded_count, presence_state, timestamped_event_summary) per direct_answer_v1 contract.
state_tasks.oa_verify: Verify the synthesized answer against privacy constraints, evidence-refs requirement, and required-fields-only rule.
state_tasks.oa_emit_answer: Emit the verified direct_answer_v1 packet with confidence, evidence_refs, caveats, privacy_scope, limitations.
state_tasks.oa_emit_insufficient: Emit the insufficient_evidence fallback packet when structured context is inadequate.
state_tasks.oa_done: Terminal state: answer packet emitted and protocol complete.
